meta.summary: YaHS 1.2.2 Hi-C genome scaffolding toolkit with yahs, juicer, agp_to_fasta, and samtools faidx support.
meta.description: YaHS 1.2.2 Hi-C genome scaffolding toolkit with yahs, juicer, agp_to_fasta, and samtools faidx support.

test: set -eu; test "$(yahs --version)" = '1.2.2' && test "$(juicer --version)" = '1.2.2' && test "$(agp_to_fasta --version)" = '1.2.2' && yahs -? 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: yahs' >/dev/null && yahs -? 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--convert-to-binary' >/dev/null && juicer 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer <command> <arguments>' >/dev/null && agp_to_fasta --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: agp_to_fasta' >/dev/null

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-yahs-convert-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>ctg1
ACGTACGTACGTACGT
>ctg2
AAAACCCCGGGGTTTT
' > "$tmp/contigs.fa"; samtools faidx "$tmp/contigs.fa"; printf 'ctg1	0	16	read001/1	60
ctg2	0	16	read001/2	60
ctg1	2	14	read002/1	60
ctg2	2	14	read002/2	60
' > "$tmp/hic.bed"; yahs --convert-to-binary --file-type BED -o "$tmp/yahs" "$tmp/contigs.fa" "$tmp/hic.bed" >/tmp/taf-yahs-convert.log 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/yahs.bin"; grep -F 'Version: 1.2.2' /tmp/taf-yahs-convert.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-yahs-convert.log

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-yahs-agp-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>ctg1
ACGTACGT
>ctg2
AAAACCCC
' > "$tmp/contigs.fa"; printf 'scaffold_1	1	8	1	W	ctg1	1	8	+
scaffold_1	9	108	2	N	100	scaffold	yes	proximity_ligation
scaffold_1	109	116	3	W	ctg2	1	8	-
' > "$tmp/scaffolds.agp"; agp_to_fasta "$tmp/scaffolds.agp" "$tmp/contigs.fa" -o "$tmp/scaffolds.fa" >/tmp/taf-yahs-agp.log 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/scaffolds.fa"; grep -F '>scaffold_1' "$tmp/scaffolds.fa" >/dev/null; grep -F 'ACGTACGT' "$tmp/scaffolds.fa" >/dev/null; grep -F 'GGGGTTTT' "$tmp/scaffolds.fa" >/dev/null; grep -F 'Version: 1.2.2' /tmp/taf-yahs-agp.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-yahs-agp.log

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-yahs-juicer-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>ctg1
ACGTACGTACGTACGT
>ctg2
AAAACCCCGGGGTTTT
' > "$tmp/contigs.fa"; samtools faidx "$tmp/contigs.fa"; printf 'scaffold_1	1	16	1	W	ctg1	1	16	+
scaffold_1	17	116	2	N	100	scaffold	yes	proximity_ligation
scaffold_1	117	132	3	W	ctg2	1	16	+
' > "$tmp/scaffolds.agp"; printf 'ctg1	0	16	read001/1	60
ctg2	0	16	read001/2	60
ctg1	2	14	read002/1	60
ctg2	2	14	read002/2	60
' > "$tmp/hic.bed"; juicer pre --file-type BED -o "$tmp/pre" "$tmp/hic.bed" "$tmp/scaffolds.agp" "$tmp/contigs.fa.fai" >/tmp/taf-yahs-juicer.log 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/pre.txt"; grep -F 'scaffold_1' "$tmp/pre.txt" >/dev/null; grep -F 'Version: 1.2.2' /tmp/taf-yahs-juicer.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-yahs-juicer.log

upstream.name: YaHS
upstream.citation: Zhou C, McCarthy SA, Durbin R. YaHS: yet another Hi-C scaffolding tool. Bioinformatics 39(1):btac808 (2023).
